feed.text: Red reached the Mt. Moon entrance with Antman and warned that the cave traffic feels organized.
Team Rocket moved fossil crates into Mt. Moon after the Pewter Museum reading.
Team Gold Dust arrived at Mt. Moon with hired miners and claimed Rocket is stealing relics from their territory.
A third fossil signal appeared under Mt. Moon: not Dome, not Helix, and not listed in any Kanto museum catalog.
